summary: P0 Bug Fix Verified: Customer portal now correctly shows active cases after enquiry submission. The fix added 'customer_user_id' field to lead creation and updated case_portal query to match customer_user_id, customer_id, AND customer_email. Frontend STAGES arrays now include 'new' stage with 'Enquiry Received' label.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/leads creates leads with both customer_id AND customer_user_id fields (lines 167-168 in leads.py)
VERIFIED: POST /api/booking-requests creates leads with both customer_id AND customer_user_id fields (lines 258-259 in booking.py)
VERIFIED: GET /api/case-portal/my-cases uses $or query with customer_user_id, customer_id, AND customer_email (lines 132-136 in case_portal.py)
VERIFIED: GET /api/case-portal/cases/{lead_id} correctly returns case detail for lead owner
VERIFIED: Frontend STAGES array includes 'new' stage (CustomerHome.js line 28, CustomerCaseDetail.js line 20)
VERIFIED: Frontend STAGE_LABELS includes 'new': 'Enquiry Received' (CustomerHome.js line 13, CustomerCaseDetail.js line 26)
VERIFIED: Progress bar correctly lights up first segment for stage='new'
seed_data_creation: Created test leads during backend testing (auto-cleaned by test fixtures)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix verified. Customer portal now correctly shows active cases. The demo customer (democustomer@venulock.in) has multiple active cases including Corporate Event (Mumbai, 50 guests) and Wedding enquiries (Delhi NCR). All cases show 'Enquiry Received' stage label correctly. The fix ensures leads created via both /api/leads and /api/booking-requests include customer_user_id field, and the case portal query matches all three identifiers (customer_user_id, customer_id, customer_email).

features_verified.backend_my_cases_query: PASS - Uses $or with customer_user_id, customer_id, customer_email
features_verified.backend_case_detail: PASS - Returns case detail for lead owner
features_verified.backend_stage_label_new: PASS - API returns 'Enquiry Received' for stage='new'
features_verified.frontend_customer_home_progress_bar: PASS - First segment lit for 'new' stage
features_verified.frontend_case_detail_assistance: PASS - Request Callback/Schedule Visit/Ask Question options visible

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Leads were created with only 'customer_id' field, but case_portal.py queried for 'customer_user_id' field. This caused 0 results for Google OAuth users whose user_id was stored in customer_id but not customer_user_id.
fix_applied: Added 'customer_user_id' field to lead creation in leads.py (line 168) and booking.py (line 259)
Updated case_portal.py to query with $or condition matching customer_user_id, customer_id, AND customer_email (lines 132-136)
Added 'new' stage to frontend STAGES arrays and STAGE_LABELS in CustomerHome.js and CustomerCaseDetail.js
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All 7 backend tests passed. Frontend UI shows active cases with correct stage labels and action pills.
